name: Anna's Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 small jalapeno peppers, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
Finely chop the peppers and add them to the bowl. Mix the salsa thoroughly.
Add the spices (about 1-2 teaspoons), mixing well.
Let the salsa chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour to allow the flavors to combine.
